race.comment: Handy little race. SURREAL I AM (2) did well to score at Pakenham Synthetic two runs ago. Not disgraced last time out when in the firing line on the corner before finishing second over 1400m at Pakenham Synthetic, beaten a neck. He loves the synthetic tracks and should get every hope up on speed here. DRAMATICUS (1) was behind SURREAL I AM last start there but ran well for third to continue his consistent form. Switches to home deck here which will suit. LIFE SENTENCE (5) finished 1.3 lengths behind the winner in second over 1400m at this track last start after lifting strongly to score two runs back. He loves it here with 5 wins from 9 starts and that alone says he goes in everything. SAVAMOON (6) progressed nicely last start to finish a close third over 1600m at Pakenham Synthetic after missing the placings at the previous appearance. Consistent sort who is in the mix again.
